title: Container Runtimes — cgroupfs driver
text:
The
cgroupfs
driver is the
default cgroup driver in the kubelet
.
When the
cgroupfs
driver is used, the kubelet and the container runtime directly interface with
the cgroup filesystem to configure cgroups.
The
cgroupfs
driver is
not
recommended when
systemd
is the
init system because systemd expects a single cgroup manager on
the system. Additionally, if you use
cgroup v2
, use the
systemd
cgroup driver instead of
cgroupfs
.
